entities.name: bootstrap_conversation_client.py
entities.context: Python script for managing bootstrap conversations - supports start, ask, and poll actions

entities.name: BOOTSTRAP_API
entities.context: Environment variable for server URL configuration, runs on port 8769

entities.name: N5
entities.context: System containing scripts directory where bootstrap tools are located

entities.name: Demonstrator
entities.context: Role/user who interacts with the bootstrap conversation system

relationships.context: Demonstrator runs the client script to start conversations, ask questions, and poll for responses
Client script connects to the API server specified by BOOTSTRAP_API environment variable
Script is located in N5/scripts/ directory
